steps.title: Choose two points
steps.content: The line of best fit rises from left to right, so its slope is positive. Two readable points on the line are approximately $(0,0.25)$ and $(4,2)$.

steps.title: Compute the slope
steps.content:
Use slope as change in $y$ divided by change in $x$.
$$m=\frac{2-0.25}{4-0}$$
$$m=\frac{1.75}{4}=0.4375$$

steps.title: Match the closest value
steps.content: The closest listed slope is $0.44$. The much larger positive value, $2.27$, is too steep for the line shown. The answer is C.
